description: Workspace template registry. Each entry is a full Data Model seed (api-registry + data-source + sandbox-environment + dashboard) plus a static activationSteps[] blueprint. The seed is consumed by `growthub starter init --seed-config <slug>`. The blueprint is consumed by a generic activation renderer (PR #216's workspace-activation.js, once refactored) so adding a template stays at: one manifest row + one seed file. No CLI or activation-library code edits.

templates.name: Project Management Workspace Template
templates.description: Opinionated workspace template for API-backed project task workflows. Built from the blank workspace starter with a sanitized project-management seed.

activation.headline: You're {{remaining}} step{{remainingPlural}} from your first task dashboard.
activation.headlineComplete: Your Project Management workspace is live.
activation.subheadlineComplete: Inspect runs, customize objects, or wire another provider.

steps.label: Configure provider auth
steps.description: Set NANGO_SECRET_KEY in your runtime environment so the workspace can talk to Nango.
steps.hint: Set NANGO_SECRET_KEY in .env.local (or your hosted runtime), then restart the workspace server.

steps.label: Connect provider through Nango
steps.description: Open the API Registry row and run Create Connect Session, then paste the connectionId Nango returns.
steps.hint: Use the Nango panel in the API Registry row — your workspace never sees provider tokens.

steps.label: Run the Active Tasks workflow
steps.description: Open the seeded workflow and click Test to pull active tasks from your project.
steps.hint: Fill projectGid + workspaceGid in the input node, then click Test.
steps.hintFailed: Open the workflow's See Runs trace and check the failing node's response.

steps.label: View the Active Tasks dashboard
steps.description: Open the dashboard to see the latest active project tasks.

steps.label: Customize this workspace
steps.description: Duplicate the dashboard, add objects, schedule the workflow, or wire another provider through Nango.
